fields.summary: TypeError computing invoice total after tax-config refactor

content.text: Customers in the APAC region get a 500 when creating an invoice. Started this week. Repro: POST /invoices for a customer whose region isn't 'us' or 'eu'.

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "billing/api.py", line 16, in create_invoice_endpoint
    total = invoice.compute_total()
  File "billing/invoice.py", line 27, in compute_total
    return self.subtotal() * self.tax_rate
TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for *: 'float' and 'NoneType'
US and EU customers are unaffected.
Only reproduces for regions outside us/eu. Smells like the tax config change that went out this week.
